zh.Chewton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特修頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff於1332年出生在英國戴文書特時，他的父親Nicholas Bonville39歲，母親Joan Champernon33歲。他於大約1359年與Margaret d'Aumarle在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1381年在英國被列為sheriff of somerset & dorset。他去世於1408年2月11日在英國素瑞藍白斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.Sock Dennis, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特索可 丹尼斯
zh-hans.Chewton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特修頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff于1332年出生在英国戴文書特时，他的父亲Nicholas Bonville39岁，母亲Joan Champernon33岁。他于大约1359年与Margaret d'Aumarle在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1381年在英国被列为sheriff of somerset & dorset。他去世于1408年2月11日在英国素瑞藍白斯享年76岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff was born in 1332, in Shute, Devon, England, his father, Nicholas Bonville, was 39 and his mother, Joan Champernon, was 33. He married Margaret d'Aumarle about 1359, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. In 1381, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as sheriff of somerset & dorset in England. He died on 11 February 1408, in Lambeth, Surrey, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff est né en 1332, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Bonville, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Champernon, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret d'Aumarle environ 1359, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. En 1381, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of somerset & dorset à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 11 février 1408, à Lambeth, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff 1332 in Shute, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Bonville 39 und seine Mutter Joan Champernon 33. Er hat um 1359 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Margaret d'Aumarle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1381, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of somerset & dorset in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Februar 1408 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Lambeth, Surrey, England und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff è nato il nel 1332 nel Shute, Devon, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Bonville, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan Champernon, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret d'Aumarle circa 1359, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1381, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of somerset & dorset nel England. Morì il 11 febbraio 1408, nel Lambeth, Surrey, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Axminster, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriffが1332年にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父Nicholas Bonvilleは39歳，母Joan Champernonは33歳であった。約1359年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでMargaret d'Aumarleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1381年，49歳の時，イギリスでの職業はsheriff of somerset & dorsetと記録されている。彼は1408年2月11日にイギリススリーランベスで76歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff(이)가 1332년 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Bonville(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Champernon(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Margaret d'Aumarle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1381년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 sheriff of somerset & dorset이었다. 그는 1408년 2월 11일 영국 수리 램스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff nasceu em 1332, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Bonville, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Champernon, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret d'Aumarle aproximadamente 1359, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1381, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of somerset & dorset em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1408, em Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff родился в 1332 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Bonville было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Champernon, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret d'Aumarle около 1359 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1381 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of somerset & dorset в местности Англия. Он умер 11 февраля 1408 г. в местности лэмбет, сурри, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия.

sm.from 1366 to 1402: mai le 1366 e o'o I le 1402

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff nació en 1332, en Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Bonville, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Champernon, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret d'Aumarle aproximadamente 1359, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1381, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of somerset & dorset en Inglaterra. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1408, en Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.
